original_prompt:
# DRIFTER — Phase 2: real Vivi, dynamic knowledge, clean dash, themes

You are working in /home/kali/drifter. Auth/security is NOT a concern 
this phase — single-user closed device. Focus is intelligence, polish, 
UX, and killing static content in favour of dynamic retrieval.

Run as a ralph loop: complete each phase in order, verify with the gate 
before moving on, do not skip phases, do not stop until all phases pass 
their gates AND `sudo ./scripts/oneshot.sh --skip-apt` reports DEPLOY: ok...
